name: Mitochondrial Transfusion Improves Mitochondrial Function Through Up-regulation of Mitochondrial Complex II Protein Subunit SDHB in the Hippocampus of Aged Mice
short_name: Aged mouse hippocampal mitochondrial transfusion study
summary: An aged-mouse study testing whether intravenous mitochondria from young mice altered mitochondrial complex protein expression in aged hippocampal tissue.
